name: Touma Kikuchi
description:
__Height:__ 178.5 cm (5'10")

Touma is a boy in Futaba's year, making his first appearance in Chapter 12. He initially has a very bad impression of Futaba, during which she trips and ends up accidentally groping him. However, he eventually softens up to her when he notices how remorseful she feels about the incident. Due to his earnest appearance, his intentions after often misunderstood, usually causing Kou to get jealous over his interaction with Futaba. His friends call him "Goodie-goodie" and "Hasabe" due to his straight-laced and honest behavior. He has a piercing on his left ear and likes wombats.
